competitions.title: Smart India Hackathon
competitions.description: Collaborate with various ministries to solve real-world problems. National level recognition for winners.

competitions.title: CodeVita Season 13
competitions.description: The world's largest coding competition. Top performers get direct interview calls for roles at TCS.

competitions.title: Imagine Cup 2026
competitions.description: Create a solution that tackles a global problem. Compete with students worldwide.

competitions.title: IMA Student Case Competition
competitions.description: The Institute of Management Accountants invites teams of 3 to 5 members to solve a case challenge on market entry. Six shortlisted teams will get to present their analysis in the finals. The top three teams will be awarded 500 USD, 200 USD, and 100 USD, respectively
